selection_window_config.aggregation_method: mean_for_selection_score; diagnostics additionally include median/std and tail slope
selection_window_config.candidate_step_alignment_rule: candidate checkpoints are periodic ckpt_step_<env_steps>.pt filtered by candidate_start_step=300000, candidate_end_step=650000, checkpoint_interval=20000

notes: Diagnostics fields are non-blocking and must not change selection_score/ranking semantics.
generalization_gap_proxy and rank_reversal_flag remain null before held-out final_probe outcomes are merged.

diagnostic_last_checkpoint_summary.evaluation_reuse_rule: last.pt final_probe row is present only if the last checkpoint was selected into post-hoc top-k

best_vs_last_gap_summary.direction_note: Positive best_minus_last is better for reward/coverage/success; negative is better for episode_length/repeat_visit_ratio.

notes: recent_train and final_probe are directionally consistent on the tracked training-quality metrics.

definitions.phase_slope_summary_unit: least_squares_slope_per_1000_env_steps; includes full/early/mid/late/last_window for future training-first comparisons
definitions.reward_threshold_note: threshold_reach_steps_reward_custom is intentionally left null in v2 because a stable formal reward threshold has not been fixed.
definitions.formal_acceptance_note: future comparisons should prioritize training dynamics first; final formal acceptance still comes from best.pt held-out final test.

notes: recent_train and final_probe are directionally consistent on the tracked training-quality metrics.
